name: replato-proyecto-final
description: Plataforma full stack para rescatar excedentes alimentarios
author: xtragerdev

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
